race.comment: SEASTRAAND (6) resumed in a mares' race over this course and distance last start and just ran out of condition in the final stages, narrowly missing the placings. Scored second-up last prep off a similar first-up rating. Lightly raced mare who looks the goods. LIGHTHOUSE LASS (8) started favourite when resuming last time out over 1100m at Gosford but was given a huge task, coming from last to finish second in an eye-catching return. Placed at both runs over today's trip. This looks in ideal assignment. WISNIERSKA (7) found 1100m a bit sharp when resuming at Gosford recently. Competitive last prep in Sydney and Brisbane Saturday races. Well placed to make an impact. MILES OF GLORY (10) resumes. Opened last prep with a narrow defeat over 1250m at Newcastle. Ran a decent race at Group 3 level when last in work so she has the class to keep these busy. Wary of SENJETSU (3) fresh. Has shown talent and has the right profile.
